channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: House of Reps Investigates $18bn Spent on Refineries Amid NNPC Delay
item.description: Di Chairman of House of Representatives Committee on Petroleum Resources (Downstream), Ikenga Ugochinyere, don talk say di NNPC no dey cooperate, na im dey delay di National Assembly investigation of ...

item.title: Kenya Introduces Bill to Make Matchfixing a Criminal Offence
item.description: Kenya has taken a major step in fighting matchfixing in sports with the presentation of the Sports (Amendment) Bill 2026 in the National Assembly on Wednesday. Nominated legislator Irene Mayaka, who s...

item.title: Tanzanian Businessman Rostam Azizi Acquires Majority Stake in Nation Media Group
item.description: Nation Media Group (NMG), one of Africa’s largest media houses, is getting a new majority owner. Tanzanian businessman Rostam Azizi, through his company Taarifa Ltd, is set to acquire a controlling 54...

item.title: FlySafair introduces temporary fuel surcharge on domestic flights
item.description: FlySafair has announced that it will implement a fuel surcharge on its domestic airline tickets starting Thursday, due to a sudden spike in jet fuel costs. The airline reported that the price of jet f...

item.title: How a Single Debate Changed My Perspective on Climate Change
item.description: Jacob Martin grew up in a small rural town in New Zealand where climate change was largely dismissed or joked about. Initially sceptical, his early understanding of the issue was shaped by local attit...

item.title: FCTA offers free surgeries and support for vulnerable women at Kuje General Hospital
item.description: For International Women's Day 2026, the Federal Capital Territory Administration (FCTA) provide free surgical treatment plus other support to seven indigent mothers for Kuje General Hospital. Dis prog...

item.title: Jaecoo unveils £45,000 seven-seat plug-in hybrid SUV with 700-mile range for UK market
item.description: Jaecoo, the Chinese brand renowned for its rapid growth in Britain, has introduced its new flagship model, the Jaecoo 8 SHS-P, a plug-in hybrid SUV priced from £45,000. This represents the marque's mo...

item.title: SILICE: Spain's Pioneering Open Scientific Information System Based on Non-Commercial Sources
item.description: The article critiques the commercialization of scientific information systems, highlighting how private publishers and databases like Web of Science, Scopus, and Dimensions profit from research produc...

item.title: Islamabad High Court Directs Formation of Medical Board for Imran Khan's Eye Treatment Assessment
item.description: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) on March 12, 2026, issued directions for the formation of a medical board to evaluate the health condition of PTI founder Imran Khan, following a petition seeking his tr...

item.title: Shashi Tharoor and Mani Shankar Aiyar exchange letters over India's position on US-Iran conflict
item.description: In the midst of the ongoing US-Iran war, senior Congress leaders Shashi Tharoor and Mani Shankar Aiyar have publicly criticised each other through open letters, reflecting internal party differences o...

item.title: Northern Ontario man accumulates over $4 million in lottery winnings
item.description: A man from Northern Ontario, who has been consistently lucky with lottery draws, recently added $88,000 to his total winnings, bringing his lifetime earnings from lottery prizes to more than $4 millio...

item.title: Boko Haram and ISWAP Establish Hideouts Close to NNPCL in Borno State
item.description: Report don show say Boko Haram and Islamic State West Africa Province (ISWAP) don build new hideouts for Tuba settlement, near Nigerian National Petroleum Company Limited (NNPCL) for Jere Local Govern...

item.title: Demidov’s late goal secures 3-2 win for Canadiens over Senators
item.description: Ivan Demidov scored the decisive goal late in the third period to lead the Montreal Canadiens to a 3-2 victory over the Ottawa Senators on Wednesday. Demidov also contributed an assist earlier in the ...

item.title: Philippines Conducts First Quarter 2026 Nationwide Earthquake Preparedness Drill
item.description: The Philippines carried out its Nationwide Simultaneous Earthquake Drill (NSED) for the first quarter of 2026 on March 12. Led by the Office of Civil Defense (OCD) together with member agencies of the...

item.title: Court of Appeal overturns Kisena and co-accused convictions over share ownership dispute
item.description: Dar es Salaam – The Court of Appeal of Tanzania has set free former Udart managing director Robert Kisena and his two colleagues after overturning their previous convictions for economic sabotage and ...

item.title: FBI Files on Jeffrey Epstein Accessed by Hacker in 2023, Investigation Ongoing
item.description: In 2023, a foreign hacker managed to gain access to files related to Jeffrey Epstein that were held at the FBI's New York Field Office, according to sources and recently released Justice Department do...

item.title: Understanding Japan’s ‘bumping’ incidents at busy pedestrian crossings
item.description: A viral video showing a young girl being deliberately shoved at the Shibuya scramble crossing in Tokyo has reignited public attention on the phenomenon known in Japan as 'butsukari' or 'bumping.' The ...

item.title: Understanding How Hospital Communication Affects Patients with Dementia
item.description: People living with dementia in hospital often experience distress when their attempts at conversation are ignored or misunderstood. Dementia affects speech and expression, but research shows that the ...

item.title: Inquiry Panel Rejects NPA’s Request to Lead Evidence Against Chauke
item.description: Chairperson of the Nkabinde enquiry, Bess Nkabinde, has denied the National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) permission to argue its own case in the investigation into Andrew Chauke, the South Gauteng dire...

item.title: Trump Endorses Brandon Herrera After Tony Gonzales Withdraws Amid Ethics Investigation
item.description: President Donald Trump has endorsed Republican Brandon Herrera for Texas’ 23rd Congressional District following the withdrawal of his primary rival, Rep. Tony Gonzales, due to an ethics investigation....
